name: Education Auth
description: User system, roles (student/teacher/parent/admin), RBAC, and multi-tenant isolation for K12 education deployments.

schoolId.description: Unique school identifier for multi-tenant deployments.

authMode.description: How users are identified. 'phone' uses channel sender ID, 'username' uses login, 'sso' uses OIDC.

allowSelfRegistration.description: When true, users can register themselves. When false, only admins can create accounts.

defaultRole.description: Default role assigned to newly registered users.

enabled.label: Enable Education Mode
enabled.help: Turn on the education user system, RBAC, and multi-tenant features.

schoolId.label: School ID
schoolId.help: Unique identifier for this school. Used for data isolation in multi-tenant setups.

authMode.label: Authentication Mode
authMode.help: 'phone' identifies users by their channel sender ID (e.g. WhatsApp number). 'username' uses login credentials. 'sso' delegates to an OIDC provider.

allowSelfRegistration.label: Allow Self-Registration
allowSelfRegistration.help: When enabled, new users can register without admin approval.

defaultRole.label: Default Role
defaultRole.help: Role assigned when a new user self-registers.
